meaning: n.制止门过开之物(如钩环)
examples: This silly brand doggy doorstop is as practical as it is cute.
The door was held open by a doorstop.
Without the kernel, your computer is a very expensive doorstop.
Carry a rubber doorstop to wedge from the inside of your room at night.
What if it's unsliced, which means it can be cut wafer-thin or doorstop thick?
